name: Giyani Metals Corp.
description: Giyani Metals Corp. is a mineral resource company focused on the development of its K.Hill manganese project in Botswana. The company aims to become a premier producer of high-purity manganese sulphate monohydrate (HPMSM), a critical battery-grade metal used in the manufacturing of lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles. Giyani is committed to sustainable and environmentally responsible mining practices as it advances its assets toward commercial production.
